_comment: Pre-Phase-3d baseline. All values null because the live REST GET /ssot/segments/{api_name} returns 404 on jdo-uqj0jr and the list endpoint does not carry memberCount. Verification in plan Step 7.8 instead checks that post-recreate counts are non-zero and reasonable (smaller than persona-level baselines from Phase 4 audit: retail ~25K, wealth ~25K, smb/commercial ~10K).
